name: Raj Patel
bio: Board-certified physician with over 20 years of experience serving the Central Valley community. Founded Patel Medical Group in 2008 to provide comprehensive family healthcare.

name: Priya Sharma
bio: Immigration and business law attorney helping families and entrepreneurs navigate the legal system. Active advocate for small business rights in the Valley.

name: Vikram Mehta
bio: Full-stack software engineer turned entrepreneur. Valley Tech Solutions provides custom web and mobile applications for small businesses throughout the Central Valley.

name: Anita Desai
bio: Top-producing real estate broker specializing in commercial properties and multi-family investments across the Central Valley market.

name: Suresh Gupta
bio: Owner and operator of three hotels in the Visalia area. Passionate about delivering exceptional guest experiences and mentoring aspiring hoteliers.

name: Neha Kapoor
bio: Certified Financial Planner providing wealth management, retirement planning, and tax strategy services to families and business owners.

name: Arjun Reddy
bio: Third-generation farmer managing 500 acres of almonds and pistachios. Advocate for sustainable farming practices and agricultural innovation.

name: Kavita Joshi
bio: Founded Bright Minds Academy to provide STEM education and SAT/ACT prep courses. Committed to helping Central Valley students reach top universities.

name: Deepak Nair
bio: General and cosmetic dentist serving families in the Clovis area. Known for patient-centered care and cutting-edge dental technology.

name: Meera Iyer
bio: Certified Public Accountant specializing in small business tax planning and bookkeeping. Helps entrepreneurs keep more of what they earn.

name: Sanjay Bhatt
bio: Licensed general contractor and developer focused on mixed-use and residential projects in downtown Fresno and surrounding communities.

name: Ritu Malhotra
bio: Award-winning restaurateur bringing authentic Indian cuisine to Fresno. Spice Route has been a local favorite since 2017 with a focus on farm-to-table ingredients.
